boundary_binding.action_boundary: May the commerce agent execute the requested customer, account, refund, order, or subscription action? Focus: high-value purchase allowed by pre-approved procurement profile.
boundary_binding.allow_rule_assessment: Source records do not close exact boundary.
boundary_binding.timing_scope_authority_dependency_check: profile cap and item category remain unresolved.

final_answer: Action may not proceed. The control record explicitly states the dependency for profile cap and item category is missing, stale, mismatched, or scoped differently. The policy requires exact source-record closure before execution. Source boundary stays open; correct disposition is escalate, not allow.
